creator: sobomax@FreeBSD.org
text:
Ernst de Haan wrote:

> The following reply was made to PR ports/28183; it has been noted by GNATS.
>
> From: Ernst de Haan <ernsth@nl.euro.net>
> To: freebsd-gnats-submit@FreeBSD.org, ernst@jollem.com
> Cc:
> Subject: Re: ports/28183: JDK Documentation ports for JDK 1.1, 1.2, 1.3 and 1.4
> Date: Fri, 5 Oct 2001 12:44:19 +0200
>
>  Why isn't this port either committed or at least responded to??? If it's
>  okay, submit it, otherwise tell me what to change...

It is ok, but cvs people have not performed requested repo-copy yet. Therefore, we
are waiting for this to happen.

-Maxim
